mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_workplace_measurement WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_workplace_measurement WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_workplace_measurement WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_workplace_measurement WHERE measurement_id = #{measurementId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_workplace_measurement WHERE measurement_year = #{measurementYear} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_workplace_measurement WHERE measurement_year = #{measurementYear} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM tb_workplace_measurement WHERE (measurement_site LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR measurement_agency LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%') AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_workplace_measurement WHERE (measurement_site LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR measurement_agency LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%') AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_workplace_measurement WHERE measurement_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_workplace_measurement ( measurement_id, work_place_id, measurement_year, measurement_half, measurement_date, measurement_agency, measurement_site, measurement_site_detail, status, overall_result, notes, author_name, author_email, author_dept, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{measurementId}, #{workPlaceId}, #{measurementYear}, #{measurementHalf}, #{measurementDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{measurementAgency}, #{measurementSite}, #{measurementSiteDetail}, #{status}, #{overallResult}, #{notes}, #{authorName}, #{authorEmail}, #{authorDept}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_workplace_measurement SET work_place_id = #{workPlaceId}, measurement_year = #{measurementYear}, measurement_half = #{measurementHalf}, measurement_date = #{measurementDate,jdbcType=DATE}, measurement_agency = #{measurementAgency}, measurement_site = #{measurementSite}, measurement_site_detail = #{measurementSiteDetail}, status = #{status}, overall_result = #{overallResult}, notes = #{notes}, author_name = #{authorName}, author_email = #{authorEmail}, author_dept = #{authorDept}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_workplace_measurement SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
